seoTitle: Hawthorn vs Hazel Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hawthorn and Hazel Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hawthorn vs Hazel Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hawthorn and Hazel Park.
heading: Hawthorn vs Hazel Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hawthorn, Victoria and Hazel Park, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hawthorn has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Hazel Park (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hawthorn or Hazel Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hawthorn has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Hazel Park scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hawthorn scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Hazel Park scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hawthorn or Hazel Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hawthorn has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
